title: Nuage Rosemary Shampoo - Contains Rosemary Extract and Proteins | Help Soothe Dry Scalps with Gentle Cleansing - Suitable For All Hair Types (400ml Bottle)
features: INFUSED WITH ROSEMARY EXTRACT: Formulated with natural rosemary extract to support healthy-looking hair and scalp. Ideal for use after long days or in colder months when scalps feel dry or tight. Enjoy a moment of calm with every wash.

BOOSTED WITH CASTOR OIL: Enriched with castor oil to help nourish roots and protect strands from daily damage. Whether styling, commuting, or exercising, hair feels stronger and softer with consistent use.
WITH NOURISHING PROTEINS: Helps strengthen strands with added proteins, supporting fuller and more manageable hair. Ideal for those with weak, limp or thinning hair needing daily care.
SOOTHES DRY SCALPS: Designed to help soothe irritation and dryness on the scalp. Perfect after time in the sun or cold weather, leaving hair refreshed and scalp comforted.
GENTLE DAILY FORMULA: This gentle cleansing shampoo is suitable for everyday use on all hair types. From busy school mornings to after-work showers, it works without harshness.
IDEAL 400ML SIZE: Generous 400ml bottle offers long-lasting use for regular washing routines. Great value for households, dorm rooms, or anyone building a healthy hair habit.
PAIR WITH ROSEMARY RANGE: Best used with the full Nuage Rosemary range including conditioner and hair & scalp oil. Create a calming self-care ritual morning or night.
SUITABLE FOR ALL HAIR TYPES: Whether hair is curly, straight, thick or fine, this formula cares gently without weighing hair down. Great for family bathrooms or shared showers.
LIGHT, CLEAN SCENT: Leaves a soft, herbal fragrance that lingers after rinsing. A refreshing choice for anyone looking to uplift their routine with the natural scent of rosemary.
TRAVEL-SIZED CONVENIENCE: Easy to decant into smaller containers for trips or keep in a gym bag for on-the-go freshness. A fuss-free option for holidays and weekends away.
description: Product Description Give hair the care it deserves with Nuage Rosemary Shampoo, enriched with rosemary extract, castor oil, and hair-loving proteins. This gentle formula is designed to soothe dry, irritated scalps while giving strands a fresh, healthy-looking shine. Suitable for all hair types and ideal for daily use, it helps maintain balance without stripping natural oils. Whether used as part of a relaxing evening shower or a quick morning refresh, this 400ml bottle delivers salon-inspired results in the comfort of home. The nourishing blend leaves hair feeling clean, soft, and more manageable. Perfect for pairing with the Nuage Rosemary Conditioner or Hair & Scalp Oil for a complete care routine. Its calming scent and travel-sized convenience also make it ideal for gym bags, overnight stays, or holidays. Restore, revive and refresh with every wash. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulphate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Cocamide DEA, Coco-Glucoside, Glyceryl Oleate, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Glycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Polyquaternium-7, Rosamarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Extract, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium EDTA, Hydrolysed Soy Protein, Potassium Sorbate, Benzoic Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid. Directions Apply to wet hair, massage into a lather, leave on for 1-2 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
